---
title: "Registration"
---

## Access Eligibility

Use of LIS/LWS microdata is restricted to **scholarly, research, or educational purposes**. Commercial use is never permitted.

Eligibility depends on user status:

- **Students** (any country) and **LIS/LWS data providers** qualify for free, unlimited access.
- **Researchers from financially contributing countries or institutions** receive unlimited access at no additional cost.
- **Other eligible researchers** may be subject to an individual user fee, based on the [World Bank Country Income Classification](http://data.worldbank.org/about/country-classifications/country-and-lending-groups).



<!-- ### Fee Coverage Notes -->

<!-- - **2018–2025:** Individual fees for eligible researchers from non-contributing middle- and low-income countries may be covered by third-party funding raised by LIS. -->

For payment arrangements, contact: [admin@lisdatacenter.org](mailto:admin@lisdatacenter.org)



## Registration & Renewal

Eligible users must complete the **online LIS Microdata User Registration** before accessing LISSY. Approved applicants receive a user ID and password by email.

- [Register for access](https://www.lisdatacenter.org/lis-luli-frontend-webapp/app/request-account-identification)
- [Renew access](https://www.lisdatacenter.org/lis-luli-frontend-webapp/app/request-renew-identification)

Access is granted for **one calendar year** and must be renewed from 1 January each year.


## Important Warnings

- **Do not register twice.** If you move to a new institution, wait until renewal to update your information.
- To change your registered email address, contact [admin@lisdatacenter.org](mailto:admin@lisdatacenter.org).
